overall_verdict.description: VERIFIED: every plan step implemented AND both make check/test passed. GAPS_FOUND: verifier confirmed real failure or missing implementation. UNKNOWN: verifier could not reach a confident conclusion (e.g., make check/test timed out or could not be run). UNKNOWN is NOT failure — it means verification is inconclusive and should be retried.

steps_verified.description: Number of plan steps fully implemented

make_check_status.description: PASSED: make check ran to completion with exit 0. FAILED: make check ran to completion with non-zero exit OR printed explicit failure markers. UNKNOWN: make check did not complete (timed out, was interrupted, could not be invoked). Return UNKNOWN rather than guessing.

make_test_status.description: PASSED: make test ran to completion and every test suite reported success. FAILED: at least one test suite reported failure. UNKNOWN: make test did not complete. Return UNKNOWN rather than guessing.

gaps_summary.description: Detailed description of gaps, missing implementations, and test failures. When overall_verdict is UNKNOWN, include WHY verification could not complete (e.g., 'make test exceeded 15-min timeout during Angular phase') so the orchestrator can retry intelligently. Passed directly to the implementer as fix instructions when GAPS_FOUND.
